calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gwen Wu, via Zoom, for Barbara Richardson, Petitioner; Judith Baer, via Zoom, in propria persona, Objector.

Ms. Wu confirms her client's position regarding her former attorney's objection and states that her client is willing to pay the fees requested by her previous counsel but that her request to Ms. Baer for documents in support of her fee request have been ignored. Ms. Baer offers advocacy for her fees. The court advises Ms. Baer that it has reviewed her papers and there is no legal basis for the court to approve recalculation of her fees from 1995 dollars to current dollars nor to award interest as prayed.

After additional discussion, the court advises that the matter will be taken under submission with the intent to award Ms. Baer a percentage of statutory fees and additional compensation for extraordinary services.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
Calendar Motion: Ltrs Of Administration  W/Auth
